transcript:
CALLER: Hello, this is Meghna Thosar. My eye doctor referred me to an ophthalmologist for a possible retina issue. I'd like to get the earliest possible appointment.
AGENT: Absolutely, Ms. Thosar. Retinal issues are time-sensitive so we want to get you seen quickly. Dr. Vijay Parekh is our senior ophthalmologist specialising in retina. He has a cancellation slot tomorrow at 9 AM — would that work?
CALLER: Yes, absolutely! Tomorrow works perfectly.
AGENT: Wonderful. Please bring your referral letter and any recent eye prescriptions or scans. Your number for confirmation?
CALLER: 9654321087.
AGENT: All set. Dr. Parekh at 9 AM tomorrow. You'll receive an SMS shortly. Please don't delay if you notice any sudden changes in vision before then — you can always walk in or call emergency.
CALLER: Thank you for the quick response.
AGENT: Of course. Take care, Ms. Thosar!
